prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: CYTOCHROME BC1 COMPLEX FROM CHICKEN. Entity description: UBIQUINOL CYTOCHROME C OXIDOREDUCTASE. Entry keywords: OXIDOREDUCTASE UBIQUINONE, OXIDOREDUCTASE, REDOX ENZYME, MEMBRANE PROTEIN, RESPIRATORY CHAIN, ELECTRON TRANSPORT. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.423237; mean_interface=0.284707; max_segment_membrane_density=0.757937; mean_disorder=0.208995. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.

V68 E65 topology sentinel source. membrane_context_strong transmembrane_context topology_evidence transmembrane topology; biological_oligomer_context may be incidental but explicit topology has priority. Coordinates, contacts, and native topology remain post-seal holdout only.
